summary: All bugs fixed in iteration 3 verified successfully. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend pages loading without date-fns crashes, capsule badges showing correct days remaining, Write page auto-interprets with GPT-5.

minor.issue: GPT-5 calls may take 20-40 seconds. Console shows 520 errors during load but API eventually responds.

issues: Unexpected text node errors in View components

critical_code_review_comments: No date-fns imports in codebase (verified via grep)
Safe date formatting functions implemented: formatDreamDate, safeDateFormat, timeAgo
Backend returns days_remaining for capsules correctly
Write page 3-phase flow (write->reflecting->done) working with GPT-5 AI interpretation
context_for_next_testing_agent: App working correctly. Mobile viewport 390x844. AI calls can take 20-40 seconds. All date-fns crashes fixed with custom French date formatting functions.

GET /api/capsules.details: Returns days_remaining (6j, 4j, 25j etc) and duration_days for each capsule

POST /api/journal/interpret.details: GPT-5 returns poetic AI interpretation within 30 seconds

Dreams list page.details: No date-fns crash, shows dates (16 fév 2026) and type badges (Récurrent, Cauchemar, Lucide)

Capsule list page.details: Shows 'Xj restants' badges correctly (6j restants, 4j restants). No 'undefined jours'

Write page (Écrire).details: 'Déposer' button with sparkles icon visible, auto-interprets after save showing 'REFLET' card

Home page.details: Shows daily notification with moon phase (Gibbeuse Croissante), poetic message

Navigation back.details: Back buttons present on Write, Dreams, Capsule list, Astrology pages
